completed.title: ARC-007 Path Memory Ablation (Proper) -- residue field zeroing degrades hippocampal proposals
completed.description: Re-run of V3-EXQ-046b (infrastructure ERROR: SIGTERM during print, not a script bug). Prerequisite: EXQ-042 PASS. Tests ARC-007 STRICT (Q-020): hippocampal proposals are value-flat, relying entirely on residue field geometry. Protocol: P1 train (600 eps), P2 eval intact, P3 ablate (zero residue field via monkeypatch), P4 eval ablated, P5 restore, P6 eval restored. PASS: C1 hippo_quality_gap_intact>0, C2 ablated<=intact*0.5, C3 restored>=ablated, C4 cal_gap_approach>0.03, C5 no errors.
completed.result_summary: Non-zero exit code 1

completed.title: Daniel-PC Batch GPU Speedup Calibration -- crossover batch size for world_forward kernel
completed.description: Infrastructure diagnostic. Sweeps batch_size [1,4,8,16,32,64,128,256,512], measures world_forward + backprop throughput (samples/sec) on CPU and GPU. Identifies crossover batch size at which Daniel-PC RTX 2060 Super beats CPU. Onboarding smoke showed GPU 3x slower at batch=1. Result feeds smart_assign() routing and informs EXQ-071+ replay-heavy experiments. Writes preferred_batch_mode to Daniel-PC.json. PASS: all cells complete without exception, n_transitions >= 4000.
completed.result_summary: Status: FAIL

completed.title: SD-003 Rollout-Batched Attribution -- batched world_forward preserves selectivity (3 distractor levels)
completed.description: Validates that batch-vectorized counterfactual rollouts (world_forward([n_cf,d]) in one call) give equivalent attribution to EXQ-030b sequential rollouts. Trains 150 eps (Fix 2: E3 on observed + E2-predicted states). Eval: paired sequential vs batched attribution at each step, rank_corr computed. Sweeps 3 distractor levels (n_hazards=2,4,6). PASS: C1 batch attribution_gap>0, C2 rank_corr>0.90 all levels, C3 batch sig_approach>0.005, C4 wf_r2>0.05, C5 n_approach>=20/level. Depends on EXQ-070 (GPU crossover confirmed before routing).
completed.result_summary: Non-zero exit code 1

completed.title: GPU/CPU Scale Crossover Benchmark -- world_dim=[32,64,128,256]
completed.description: Operational benchmark (not a scientific experiment). Sweeps world_dim=[32,64,128,256] and measures CPU vs GPU training throughput at each scale. Identifies the GPU crossover point on current hardware. Provides baseline data for comparison against Spark hardware when available. Results recorded to evidence/experiments/v3_scale_benchmark/. Not tied to a scientific claim.
